mapper.sql: SELECT ASMT.ASMT_ID , ASMT.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID , ASMT.ASMT_GRP_ID , ASMT.ASMT_TTL , ASMT.ASMT_CTS , ASMT.ASMT_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND LANG_CD = NVL(#{langCd}, 'ko') AND UP_CD = 'ASMT_GBNCD' AND CD = ASMT.ASMT_GBNCD) AS ASMT_GBNNM , ASMT.DVCLAS_NO , ASMT.LRN_GRP_ID , ASMT.SBASMT_TYCD , ASMT.EVL_SCR_TYCD , ASMT.RUBLIC_ID , ASMT.DELYN , ASMT.SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD , ASMT.ASMT_OYN , ASMT.ASMT_PRCTCYN , ASMT.AVG_SCR_OYN , ASMT.PUSH_ALIMYN , ASMT.DVCLAS_CNCRNT_REGYN , ASMT.INDV_ASMTYN , ASMT.TEAM_ASMT_STNGYN , ASMT.TMBR_INDIV_SBMSN_PRMYN , ASMT.MRK_RFLTYN , ASMT.MRK_RFLTRT , ASMT.MRK_OYN , ASMT.MRK_INQ_SDTTM , ASMT.MRK_INQ_EDTTM , ASMT.EVL_USEYN , ASMT.EVL_SDTTM , ASMT.EVL_EDTTM , ASMT.EVL_RSLT_OYN , ASMT.SBASMT_OSTD_OYN , ASMT.SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM , ASMT.SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_EDTTM , ASMT.RESBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT.RESBMSN_EDTTM , ASMT.RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM , ASMT.EXTD_SBMSN_PRMYN , ASMT.EXTD_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT.EXTD_SBMSN_EDTTM , ASMT.RGTR_ID , ASMT.REG_DTTM , ASMT.MDFR_ID , ASMT.MOD_DTTM , ASMT.SBJCT_ID , ASMT.EXLN_ASMT_DWLDYN , ASMT.BYTEAM_ASMT_USEYN , ASMT.UP_ASMT_ID , ASMT.TEAM_ASMT_OYN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmtDAO.dvclasList 설 명 : 분반 목록 */ WITH BASE AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID , PROF_ID , SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT SBJCT.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO , SBJCT.PROF_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN BASE ON SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = BASE.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJCT.PROF_ID = BASE.PROF_ID WHERE SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : AsmtDAO.lrnGrpTeamList 설 명 : 학습그룹별 팀 목록 + 부과제 조회 */ SELECT TEAM.TEAM_ID , TEAM.TEAMNM , TEAM.LRN_GRP_ID , LEADER.USERNM AS LEADERNM , NVL(TEAM_MBR_CNT.TEAM_MBR_CNT, 0) AS TEAM_MBR_CNT , SUB_ASMT.ASMT_ID , SUB_ASMT.ASMT_TTL , SUB_ASMT.ASMT_CTS FROM TB_LMS_TEAM TEAM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID , COUNT(*) AS TEAM_MBR_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR GROUP BY TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID ) TEAM_MBR_CNT ON TEAM_MBR_CNT.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR LEADER_MBR ON LEADER_MBR.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID AND LEADER_MBR.LDRYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER LEADER ON LEADER.USER_ID = LEADER_MBR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRGT.TEAM_ID , ASMT.ASMT_ID , ASMT.ASMT_TTL , ASMT.ASMT_CTS FROM TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN_TRGT TRGT ON TRGT.ASMT_ID = ASMT.ASMT_ID WHERE ASMT.UP_ASMT_ID = #{upAsmtId} AND ASMT.DELYN = 'N' ) SUB_ASMT ON SUB_ASMT.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID WHERE TEAM.LRN_GRP_ID = #{lrnGrpId} AND TEAM.TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' ORDER BY TEAM.TEAMNM
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : AsmtDAO.asmtRegist 설 명 : 과제 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_ASMT ( ASMT_ID , SBJCT_ID , UP_ASMT_ID , ASMT_GRP_ID , ASMT_TTL , ASMT_CTS , ASMT_GBNCD , DVCLAS_NO , LRN_GRP_ID , SBASMT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , RUBLIC_ID , DELYN , SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD , ASMT_PRCTCYN , DVCLAS_CNCRNT_REGYN , INDV_ASMTYN , TEAM_ASMT_STNGYN , TMBR_INDIV_SBMSN_PRMYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_RFLTRT , MRK_OYN , MRK_INQ_SDTTM , MRK_INQ_EDTTM , SBASMT_OSTD_OYN , SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM , SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_EDTTM , RESBMSN_SDTTM , RESBMSN_EDTTM , RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT , ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM , EXTD_SBMSN_PRMYN , EXTD_SBMSN_SDTTM , EXTD_SBMSN_EDTTM , EXLN_ASMT_DWLDYN , BYTEAM_ASMT_USEYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{asmtId} , #{sbjctId} , #{upAsmtId} , #{asmtGrpId} , #{asmtTtl} , #{asmtCts} , #{asmtGbncd} , #{dvclasNo} , #{lrnGrpId} , #{sbasmtTycd} , #{evlScrTycd} , #{rublicId} , 'N' , #{sbmsnFileMimeTycd} , NVL(#{asmtPrctcyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{dvclasCncrntRegyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{indvAsmtyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{teamAsmtStngyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{tmbrIndivSbmsnPrmyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mrkRfltyn}, 'N') , 0 , NVL(#{mrkOyn}, 'N') , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{mrkInqSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{mrkInqEdttm}) , NVL(#{sbasmtOstdOyn}, 'N') , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{sbasmtOstdOpenSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{sbasmtOstdOpenEdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{resbmsnSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{resbmsnEdttm}) , NVL(#{resbmsnMrkRfltrt}, 0) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{asmtSbmsnSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{asmtSbmsnEdttm}) , NVL(#{extdSbmsnPrmyn}, 'N') , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{extdSbmsnSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{extdSbmsnEdttm}) , NVL(#{exlnAsmtDwldyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{byteamAsmtUseyn}, 'N') , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmtDAO.teamTrgtList 설 명 : 팀 대상 목록 조회 */ SELECT TEAM.TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM TEAM WHERE TEAM.LRN_GRP_ID = #{lrnGrpId} AND TEAM.TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' ORDER BY TEAM.TEAMNM

/* SQL ID : AsmtDAO.allStdTrgtList 설 명 : 전체 수강 대상 조회 */ SELECT USR.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = ATNDLC.USER_ID WHERE ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND ATNDLC.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND USR.USER_STSCD = 'ACTV'
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : AsmtDAO.subAsmtByCopyRegist 설 명 : 부과제 복사 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_ASMT ( ASMT_ID , UP_ASMT_ID , SBJCT_ID , DVCLAS_NO , ASMT_GBNCD , ASMT_TTL , ASMT_CTS , ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM , EXTD_SBMSN_PRMYN , EXTD_SBMSN_SDTTM , EXTD_SBMSN_EDTTM , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_OYN , EVL_SCR_TYCD , SBASMT_TYCD , SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD , ASMT_PRCTCYN , EXLN_ASMT_DWLDYN , TEAM_ASMT_STNGYN , INDV_ASMTYN , SBASMT_OSTD_OYN , SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM , SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_EDTTM , ASMT_GRP_ID , LRN_GRP_ID , RUBLIC_ID , DVCLAS_CNCRNT_REGYN , TMBR_INDIV_SBMSN_PRMYN , MRK_INQ_SDTTM , MRK_INQ_EDTTM , RESBMSN_SDTTM , RESBMSN_EDTTM , RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT , BYTEAM_ASMT_USEYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) SELECT #{asmtId} , #{upAsmtId} , #{sbjctId} , #{dvclasNo} , ASMT.ASMT_GBNCD , #{asmtTtl} , #{asmtCts} , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM , ASMT.EXTD_SBMSN_PRMYN , ASMT.EXTD_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT.EXTD_SBMSN_EDTTM , ASMT.MRK_RFLTYN , ASMT.MRK_OYN , ASMT.EVL_SCR_TYCD , ASMT.SBASMT_TYCD , ASMT.SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD , ASMT.ASMT_PRCTCYN , ASMT.EXLN_ASMT_DWLDYN , ASMT.TEAM_ASMT_STNGYN , ASMT.INDV_ASMTYN , ASMT.SBASMT_OSTD_OYN , ASMT.SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM , ASMT.SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_EDTTM , ASMT.ASMT_GRP_ID , ASMT.LRN_GRP_ID , ASMT.RUBLIC_ID , ASMT.DVCLAS_CNCRNT_REGYN , ASMT.TMBR_INDIV_SBMSN_PRMYN , ASMT.MRK_INQ_SDTTM , ASMT.MRK_INQ_EDTTM , ASMT.RESBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT.RESBMSN_EDTTM , ASMT.RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT , ASMT.BYTEAM_ASMT_USEYN , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT WHERE ASMT.ASMT_ID = #{upAsmtId}
